Metadata.title: Alcheme — Turn Noise into Gold
Metadata.description: A decentralized protocol for order and knowledge assets. Refine fragmented discussion into traceable, valuable digital crystals.

ConnectPage.title: Welcome back
ConnectPage.walletHint: Works with Solana wallets like Phantom and Solflare

helper.default: Handles must be 3-32 characters, use letters/numbers/underscores, and cannot start with a number.

syncing.onboarding: Your identity is on-chain. Waiting for indexing so we can finish signing you in.

lead.onboarding: This wallet is connected, but it does not have a sign-in-ready on-chain identity yet. Once this is done, you can join circles and start contributing for real.

sessionError.title: We couldn't confirm your identity

unregistered.title: Wallet connected, identity still missing

header.title: Pick up your thread
header.subtitle: Knowledge settles inside circles. The public feed only shows highlighted Lv0 signals.

empty.following: People you follow haven't posted anything visible yet. Check back soon.

validation.feedNotAllowed: Knowledge-mode circles only support draft publishing.
validation.draftNotAllowed: Social-mode circles only support feed publishing.

composer.placeholder: Write your idea, question or insight…

empty.title: No circle available for posting yet
empty.description: You're currently browsing as a guest. Quick posts must belong to a circle, so create one or join one first.

selectors.chooseRequired: Choose a circle to post into (required)
selectors.createOrJoinFirst: Create or join a circle first

intent.feedTitleDisabled: Only social-mode circles support feed posts

ComposePage.hint: Quick publish supports both feed and draft intents: social circles default to feed, while knowledge circles can turn a thought straight into a draft for collaborative refinement.

CirclesPage.title: Circles
CirclesPage.subtitle: Find the territory where your knowledge can settle

search.relatedResults: Found {count} related content results as well

fields.name: Circle name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the theme and purpose of this circle…
fields.seededFilesHint: At this stage these files are only used as source references and AI grounding. They do not turn the draft into a multi-file working copy.

creationScope.nextLevelDisabledReason: You don't currently meet the requirements to create the next-level circle.
creationScope.nextLevelUnavailable: This account can't create the next-level circle right now.

social.name: Social mode
social.line2: Great for interest groups and everyday exchange

knowledge.name: Knowledge mode
knowledge.line2: Great for structured docs and subprojects

seeded.line2: Better when the topic already has source material

genesis.seededHint: SEEDED still creates a single-document draft; it simply lets later steps reference uploaded material and source files.

reviewEntryModeHelp.auto_only: The editor closes automatically when time runs out and moves straight into issue review.
reviewEntryModeHelp.manual_only: Only people with permission can manually end editing and move into issue review.
reviewEntryModeHelp.auto_or_manual: It can enter review automatically when time runs out, or be ended manually earlier.

summaryUseLlm.title: Use AI to generate discussion summaries
summaryUseLlm.hint: When enabled, the system will organize the recent discussion into a short summary.
summaryUseLlm.warning: When disabled, the system falls back to rule-based summaries, which may be less accurate.

draftTriggerMode.title: What to do after a trigger
draftTriggerMode.hint: Once the system decides the discussion is ready to enter the draft workflow, should it only notify or create a draft immediately?

triggerSummaryUseLlm.title: Use AI to help decide whether to trigger a draft
triggerSummaryUseLlm.hint: When enabled, the system first organizes the recent discussion, then uses AI to help decide whether it should enter the draft workflow.
triggerSummaryUseLlm.warning: When disabled, the system falls back to rule-based trigger checks, which may be less accurate.

autoEntryWindow.title: Auto-entry timer
autoEntryWindow.hint: When this timer ends, the editor moves from drafting into issue review.

reviewWindow.title: Review duration
reviewWindow.hint: When time is up, the current review round ends and the team can decide whether to revise again or crystallize.

workflow.advanceFromReviewMinRole: Who can end the current review round

free.name: Open
free.description: Any member of the main circle can join freely

crystal.name: Crystal threshold
crystal.description: Requires holding a minimum amount of crystals

reviewEntry.autoOrManual: Auto or manual entry into review

reviewSummary.withAuto: · auto-entry in {draftingWindowMinutes} min · review {reviewWindowMinutes} min · up to {maxRevisionRounds} rounds

errors.seededRequired: Select at least one seeded source file.

states.empty: Nothing new in this circle yet

repost.emptyBody: The original post had no text

repostReasons.pending_membership: Your join request is waiting for review

defaults.slogan: When disagreement points to a different future, forking is more honest than forcing alignment.
defaults.declarationPlaceholder: Write down what this fork needs to protect, and why it should start independently from the current circle.
defaults.hintBody: This view explains the contribution bar, identity floor, inheritance mode, and lineage scope. The actual create entry stays on the circle page.

threshold.disabled: Forking isn't open in this circle yet.
threshold.base: At least {minimumContributions} contributions, with status at or above {roleLabel}

inheritance.locked: The new circle starts with upstream settings and keeps them locked.
inheritance.editable: The new circle starts with upstream settings, then remains editable.
inheritance.independent: The new circle starts from independent settings instead of inheriting upstream.

knowledgeLineage.upstreamUntilForkNode: Knowledge lineage follows upstream until the new fork node appears.

qualification.qualified: You meet the current requirements and can fork.
qualification.forkDisabled: Forking isn't open in this circle yet.
qualification.identityShortfall: Your current role or identity is still below the {roleLabel} floor.
qualification.contributionShortfall: Need {missing} more contributions before you can submit.
qualification.fallback: You still don't meet the submit requirements.

values.originMarker: Shown later in the overview or lineage panel instead of the main layout.
values.retentionRhythm: Checked on days 2 / 7 / 30 / 90 / 180, then hidden after two inactive checks.

eligibility.title: Why this fork can happen now

eligibility.fallbackSlogan: When disagreement points to a different future, forking is more honest than forcing alignment.
eligibility.pendingTarget: Fork circle #{targetCircleId} already exists. Finishing the filing won't create it again.

CircleSummaryReadinessPanel.title: What this page is built from

truthSource.title: Current source of truth
truthSource.snapshotNote: This page is currently grounded in CircleSummarySnapshot v{version}, generated by {generatedBy}.
truthSource.pendingSnapshotOnly: This page only accepts the formal CircleSummarySnapshot as summary truth. Until that snapshot is readable, it keeps boundary notes only and does not fall back to scaffold truth.
truthSource.snapshotTruthLive: This page is already reading the formal summary truth.

knowledgePath.title: Reads directly from the settled knowledge path

items.identityAndVersion: Identity and version of each settled conclusion
items.snapshotLineage: The lineage exposed by contribution snapshots

draftBaseline.title: Adds the draft baseline only when needed

items.workingCopy: Editable body version and last update time

draftBaseline.noteWithDraft: The stable fields from draft #{draftPostId} are already available, so this page can use them as its draft baseline.
draftBaseline.noteWithoutDraft: There is still no single draft baseline, so the page stays anchored in the settled knowledge path.
draftBaseline.degradationLead: These are deliberate downgrade labels, not page failures.

references.title: Reference readiness
references.note: These are the stable fields the current reference UI depends on. The reference page reads them through the dedicated DraftReferenceLink path.

pending.heroLead: Formal summaries only come from CircleSummarySnapshot. Until that snapshot is readable, this page keeps the boundary clear instead of pretending to be the real thing.
pending.snapshotEmpty: There is no readable CircleSummarySnapshot yet, and this page will not pretend the scaffold route map is the formal summary truth.

appendix.title: Supporting notes
appendix.meta: This stays off the main stage and only explains the current boundary when needed.
appendix.loadingDraft: Checking whether this page has a single stable draft baseline…
appendix.loadingOutputs: Loading the settled output list for this circle…
appendix.sourceDraftReady: This page can already trace back to the stable fields of draft #{draftPostId} to fill in the knowledge baseline.
appendix.forkLineageNote: Fork source badges appear later and stay out of the main structure. They are checked on days 2, 7, 30, 90, and 180 in the overview or lineage view, hidden after two inactive checks, and kept permanently if they are still alive on the final check.
appendix.snapshotPriorityLead: This page prefers formal snapshot v{version}. It was generated by
appendix.snapshotPriorityWithMode: , and the actual sourcing mode was {providerMode}.

primaryRoutes.title: Start from the main route
primaryRoutes.meta: Follow one primary line first, then decide whether to branch out.
primaryRoutes.loading: Organizing the settled main routes for this circle…

empty.routeLabel: The main line is still forming
empty.title: This circle doesn't have a stable settlement yet
empty.hint: Keep building facts, explanations, and verifiable points of disagreement around the current theme first.
empty.cardTitle: Grow the first line that can truly stand on its own
empty.cardHint: Once the first settled result appears, this page can expand into a real route map.
empty.bodyFallback: There is no stable settlement yet, so keep focusing the topic through discussion and draft work.

facts.missingValue: One conclusion that can hold steady
facts.nextStepValue: Add facts, explanations, and verifiable disagreements

issueMap.title: What to read first
issueMap.meta: Start with the lines that already stand, then choose whether to go deeper.

situation.title: Current state
situation.meta: Read the current progress in one glance.

coverage.title: How solid are these lines
coverage.meta: They are not equally reliable, so check the evidence strength first.

timeline.title: How the settlement formed
timeline.meta: Link the draft baseline and the crystal outputs in time order.
timeline.empty: There are not enough stable settlement nodes yet to form a timeline.

questions.title: What still isn't clear
questions.meta: Lay out the unresolved parts directly.
questions.empty: The main settlement threads are already visible. The fuller map, conflict context, and open-question snapshot can be added next.

entry.title: How to enter now
entry.meta: Different roles benefit from different entry points.

newcomer.body: Start from the current main topic and the most mature settled branch, then check whether a single draft baseline already exists.

participant.body: Prioritize the evidence gaps called out in the unresolved questions, especially stable snapshots and source-draft bindings.

hero.title: Circle {circleId} knowledge map
hero.lead: Start with where the topic is converging, which branches have already settled, and what still needs evidence.

issueMap.stableConclusionTitle: Start with the conclusion that has stabilized
issueMap.stableConclusionBodyWithOutput: The clearest settled thread right now is “{title}”, so that is the best place to enter this circle's map.
issueMap.stableConclusionBodyWithoutOutput: There is no stable settled output yet, so this page first helps you see what is converging and what is still taking shape.
issueMap.draftBaselineTitle: Then trace it back to the draft baseline
issueMap.draftBaselineBodyWithDraft: You can now go back to draft #{draftPostId} and its stable v{draftVersion} snapshot to understand how this settlement formed.
issueMap.draftBaselineBodyWithoutDraft: There is no single stable draft baseline yet, so enter from the settled outputs instead of pretending the draft truth is settled.

route.primaryHint: If this is your first time in the circle, start here.
route.parallelHint: Use this branch when you want to compare a different interpretation.

branch.evidenceSummarySnapshot: This branch already has stable snapshot evidence and can act as a trustworthy summary entry point.
branch.evidenceSummarySettlementFallback: This branch has clearly settled, but its source chain is still replay-level evidence.
branch.evidenceSummaryUnknown: This branch is visible, but the snapshot-level source evidence is still incomplete.
branch.citationSummary: Cited {citationCount} times · preview refs {outboundReferenceCount} / cited by {inboundReferenceCount}

situation.formedConclusionsDescription: Start with what has already stabilized.
situation.visibleEntriesDescription: This counts the routes you can enter now, not the full branch graph.
situation.draftBaselineDescription: Once a single draft is resolved, you can trace how the line actually grew.

coverage.snapshotDescription: Settled outputs that already point back to stable snapshot evidence.
coverage.settlementDescription: Outputs are clearly settled, but the full snapshot chain is still incomplete.
coverage.unresolvedDescription: The result is visible, but its source evidence still needs to be grounded.

timeline.outputSummarySnapshot: Settled into a knowledge output and can be traced back to stable snapshot evidence.
timeline.outputSummaryFallback: Settled into a knowledge output, but the source chain still needs more evidence.
timeline.draftSummary: Draft #{draftPostId} currently provides the body baseline for this knowledge map.

questions.noStableOutputTitle: The first stable output has not appeared yet
questions.noStableOutputBody: Right now it is more honest to keep adding facts, explanations, and disagreements than to pretend there is already a clear conclusion.
questions.noDraftBaselineTitle: There is still no single draft baseline
questions.noDraftBaselineBody: The page still cannot reliably anchor everything back to one draft version, so you should enter from the settled outputs first.
questions.missingSnapshotTitle: Some settled outputs still lack stable snapshots
questions.missingSnapshotBody: These results are already visible, but their traceable snapshot evidence is still incomplete.
questions.missingDraftBindingTitle: Some outputs still do not bind back to a source draft
questions.missingDraftBindingBody: They are clearly settled, but not yet stably anchored back to a draft entry point.

reference.note: The reference page consumes these stable fields through the dedicated DraftReferenceLink public-read surface rather than a temporary Team 00 window.

degradation.selectedDraft: No single draft baseline has been resolved yet
degradation.snapshotEvidence: This conclusion still lacks stable snapshot evidence
degradation.draftBinding: This conclusion still lacks a stable draft binding

empty.noCrystals: You don't have any crystals yet. Contribute knowledge inside circles to grow them.

errors.saveFailed: We couldn't save your profile right now. Please try again later.

seed.name: Seed
seed.description: Seed: dormant ore, keeping watch over the first layer of order.

sprout.name: Sprout
sprout.description: Sprout: thought breaks the surface and amber veins begin to pulse.

bloom.name: Bloom
bloom.description: Bloom: a stable crystal cluster where geometric logic begins to settle.

radiant.name: Radiant
radiant.description: Radiant: multi-dimensional truths braid together into clear insight.

legendary.name: Legendary
legendary.description: Legendary: time has weight now — cold like crystal outside, warm like current within.

notFound.title: Knowledge crystal not found
notFound.description: This crystal may not have settled yet, or it may have been removed.

hint.recorded: This timeline is assembled from recorded version events.
hint.partial: Right now we show the first crystallization and the latest version. Intermediate changes are not expanded yet.
hint.initialOnly: This is still the initial version.

errors.fetchDraftReferenceLinks: We couldn't load the draft reference entries.
errors.fetchFormalOutput: We couldn't load the formal CrystalOutput.

formalOutput.label: Formal crystallization output
formalOutput.emptyMessage: There is no consumable formal CrystalOutput yet, so this page does not pretend the contribution ledger is the final contract.

master.title: Master NFT
master.description: This master NFT represents the settled knowledge crystal itself. Once crystallization succeeds, it enters the mint queue automatically.

receipts.title: Contributor receipts
receipts.empty: No contributor receipt projection exists yet. New crystals fill this after contributor entitlements are created.

summaryLink.title: Open circle summary
summaryLink.withDraft: Open the summary view for this conclusion with draft #{draftPostId} →
summaryLink.default: Start from the circle's settled summary view →
summaryLink.referencesLoading: Loading draft reference entries from the formal citation surface…
summaryLink.referencesReady: Loaded {totalCount} formal reference entries across {sourceBlockCount} source blocks.
summaryLink.referencesEmpty: There are no formal DraftReferenceLink entries yet.

citations.referencesEmpty: This crystal doesn't cite any others yet.
citations.citedByEmpty: Nothing upstream cites this crystal yet.

KnowledgeDiscussionPanel.fallbackSummary: This crystal has already settled. The thread below should stay focused on its claims, derivation and impact.

errors.loadThread: The topic thread is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.permissionDenied: This session can't post here right now. Reconnect your wallet or rejoin the source circle and try again.
errors.postFailed: We couldn't post this floor right now. Please try again later.

KnowledgeDiscussionPanel.title: Topic thread
KnowledgeDiscussionPanel.lead: This crystal acts as the topic post. The replies below should only extend, challenge or annotate the knowledge itself.

topic.rule: Unlike the fast-moving Plaza chat, this space should hold arguments, objections and annotations worth revisiting.

membershipLoading.title: Checking access
membershipLoading.description: Only active members of the source circle can view this crystal's topic thread.

locked.title: Topic thread locked
locked.description: Join the source circle to read or contribute to this crystal's thread.

threadLoading.title: Opening the floors
threadLoading.description: We're unfolding the discussion around this crystal into a readable thread.

empty.description: No one has left a floor yet. The first reply should add a derivation, raise an objection, or record a new judgment that surfaced when this crystal was used later.

composer.title: Add the next floor
composer.hint: Add an annotation, challenge, derivation or citation path here instead of casual chat.
composer.placeholder: For example: how is this crystal being interpreted in a new circle, and which assumptions still need support?
composer.walletRequired: Connect your wallet before you leave a floor.
composer.boundHint: This reply is attached to the current crystal and carries its own heat.

KnowledgeCitationPanel.title: Cite this crystal
KnowledgeCitationPanel.lead: Manage or supplement citations for this already crystallized knowledge item by choosing one of your other crystals.

errors.sourceNotFound: No usable citation source was found. Refresh and try again.
errors.engineUnavailable: The citation engine is not available in this environment, so we can't submit an on-chain citation.
errors.submitFailed: We couldn't submit the citation. Please try again later.

status.submitted: Citation submitted. Indexing will update counts and notifications shortly. tx: {signature}...

loading.title: Loading your crystals
loading.description: Citation sources are chosen from the knowledge crystals you have already settled so you can supplement this crystallized result.

error.title: We couldn't load your crystals right now
error.description: Make sure your current session is signed in, then try again.

empty.title: No citation source yet
empty.description: You need at least one other crystal before you can cite this one.

footer.connectHint: Connect your wallet to submit an on-chain citation.
footer.defaultHint: This panel manages formal citations for an already crystallized result. Citations use a real on-chain transaction, then the indexer writes the result back.

KnowledgeVersionDiffPanel.title: Version compare
KnowledgeVersionDiffPanel.subtitle: For now this panel shows a structured compare built from version events rather than inventing historical body snapshots.

states.notEnoughVersions: There aren't enough version points to compare yet.
states.noDiff: The currently selected versions do not have a readable diff yet.
states.noFieldChanges: There are no readable differences between these two versions.

notes.metadataOnly: Historical body snapshots are not stored yet, so this panel prioritizes event metadata differences. If one side happens to be the current version, the current readable title, description and content hash are included.

summary.metadataOnly: For now only version-event metadata can be compared because historical body snapshots are not stored yet.
summary.noFieldChanges: There are no readable differences between these two versions.

DiscussionDiagnosticsPage.title: Discussion diagnostics
DiscussionDiagnosticsPage.subtitle: This is the full discussion AI debug view: not just the result, but also the input, runtime, output, decision path and failure state.

errors.authentication_required: Sign in with an account that has management access to this circle before loading diagnostics.
errors.private_sidecar_required: This diagnostics route only works on a private sidecar node. Make sure you're connected to the private diagnostics node.
errors.discussion_message_not_found: We couldn't find that message, or you don't manage this circle.
errors.discussion_trigger_not_found: This circle does not have any trigger runs yet.
errors.discussion_analysis_diagnostics_failed: We couldn't load the message analysis snapshot. Check query-api logs and your current sign-in state.
errors.discussion_summary_diagnostics_failed: We couldn't load the discussion summary snapshot. Check the summary route, cache and current sign-in state.
errors.discussion_trigger_diagnostics_failed: We couldn't load the trigger snapshot. Check ghost_runs and the related worker logs.
errors.discussion_analysis_reanalyze_failed: We couldn't requeue this analysis. Check permissions, node type and worker status.

controls.circlePlaceholder: Enter a circle id to load recent messages

decision.offTopic: Marked off-topic because the semantic score stayed below the focus threshold.
decision.focused: Marked focused because both semantic and focus signals cleared the focused threshold.
decision.contextual: Marked contextual because the message stayed inside topic context but did not clear the focused threshold.

decision.cacheMiss: The summary was generated from the current window.
decision.currentConfig: The summary was generated under the current config ({source}).
decision.cachedVsCurrentConfig: The cached summary was generated under {cachedSource}, while the current config is {currentSource}.
decision.exactFidelity: The source window exactly matches the cached summary input.
decision.metadataOnlyFidelity: Only the current window is available. The cached summary came from an older payload without exact source messages.

decision.scopeNotice: Circle trigger diagnostics are circle-scoped. The selected message only helps you compare whether it appears in windowEnvelopeIds.

open.label: Candidate

errors.walletRequired: Connect your wallet before sending a message.

candidate.retryDenied: Candidate {candidateId} cannot be retried under the current policy.

candidate.createDenied: Candidate {candidateId} needs a circle manager to create the formal draft.

fallback.emptyParagraph: This paragraph does not have body text yet.

issueCarry.title: This paragraph has accepted issues you can resolve during this edit
issueCarry.hint: When you finish editing, every checked issue will be written into this paragraph’s application record so the resolution chain stays traceable. If this paragraph just used an issue-thread revision, the related issues will start preselected and you can still deselect them.

readOnly.editorDisconnected: The collaborative editor is offline right now, so paragraph editing is temporarily unavailable.

readOnly.contentLocked: 🔒 Your current role can only view the body and cannot edit paragraphs directly.

AgentAdminPanel.title: Agent governance and audit
AgentAdminPanel.subtitle: Review the current agent registry and set governance boundaries for automatic triggers, discounts and review thresholds.
AgentAdminPanel.ownerOnly: Only the circle owner can edit this

states.empty: No agents are registered in this circle yet.

AgentAdminPanel.auditNote: Trigger scope decides whether agents can participate in circle-level automation, discount governs cost policy, and review threshold decides whether Owner/Admin approval is required.

permissions.forwardDescription: Members can forward messages to other circles.

identityRules.title: Circle identity rules
identityRules.lead: Members need an identity and must join the circle before speaking formally.
identityRules.initiateText: Become an initiate after sending {count} messages.
identityRules.memberText: Become a member after receiving {count} citations.
identityRules.elderText: Reach the top {percentile}% of circle reputation to become an elder.
identityRules.footnote: Identity can decay after {count} days of inactivity.

draftLifecycle.title: Draft workflow settings

help.autoOnly: Body editing ends automatically when the timer expires and moves into issue review.
help.manualOnly: Only authorized members can end body editing manually and enter issue review.
help.autoOrManual: Review starts automatically on timeout, but it can also be ended manually earlier.

draftLifecycle.autoReviewTimeHint: When the timer ends, body editing switches into issue review.
draftLifecycle.reviewWindowHint: When the timer ends, the round is considered complete and waits for the next revision or crystallization.

draftWorkflow.title: Issue and stage permissions
draftWorkflow.advanceFromReview: Who can end this review round

source.pending: Current: pending override (goes live once the circle is indexed)

ghost.summaryUseLlmTitle: Use AI to generate discussion summaries
ghost.summaryUseLlmDescription: When enabled, the system will organize the recent discussion into a short summary.
ghost.summaryUseLlmWarning: When disabled, the system falls back to rule-based summaries, which may be less accurate.
ghost.triggerModeLabel: What to do after a trigger
ghost.triggerModeHint: Once the system decides the discussion is ready to enter the draft workflow, should it only notify or create a draft immediately?
ghost.triggerSummaryUseLlmTitle: Use AI to help decide whether to trigger a draft
ghost.triggerSummaryUseLlmDescription: When enabled, the system first organizes the recent discussion, then uses AI to help decide whether it should enter the draft workflow.
ghost.triggerSummaryUseLlmWarning: When disabled, the system falls back to rule-based trigger checks, which may be less accurate.

warnings.missingDraftSource: The original source handoff is missing, so the draft source is shown as unavailable for now.
warnings.missingAnchorEvidence: The current stable snapshot is missing draft-anchor evidence, so source details rely on the recorded handoff metadata.
warnings.legacyApplicationEvidence: Some historical issue applications still rely on legacy evidence and are being normalized.
warnings.boundVersionOnly: The current stable snapshot is still missing complete application evidence, so the bound version is shown for now.
warnings.fallback: This draft still has one unresolved lifecycle detail.

CrucibleLifecycleHeader.reviewLead: {count} issues are currently bound to v{version}

drafting.manualWithIssues: Revision round {round} is in progress. {count} issues are moving around v{version}, and review can be entered manually when the team is ready.
drafting.manualNoIssues: Revision round {round} is in progress, and review can be entered manually when the team is ready.
drafting.autoWithIssues: Revision round {round} is in progress. {count} issues are moving around v{version}, and review is expected around {window}.
drafting.autoNoIssues: Revision round {round} is in progress, and review is expected around {window}.

review.expiredWithIssues: The body is locked. Review has ended for {count} issues bound to v{version}; decide whether to start another round or enter crystallization.
review.expiredNoIssues: The body is locked. Review for v{version} has ended; decide whether to start another round or enter crystallization.
review.activeWithIssues: The body is locked. {count} issues bound to v{version} are under review, and this round is expected to end around {window}.
review.activeNoIssues: The body is locked. The review round for v{version} is waiting for issues and is expected to end around {window}.

archived.withStableVersion: This archived draft preserves stable v{version} and its discussion history. Restore it to continue with a new revision round.
archived.withoutStableVersion: This archived draft preserves the current body and discussion history. Restore it to continue with a new revision round.

summary.crystallizationActive: The body is locked, and v{version} is in crystallization.
summary.crystallizationFailed: Crystallization did not complete for v{version}. You can continue resolving issues and try again later.
summary.crystallized: This draft crystallized successfully, and the stable result is v{version}.
summary.default: This draft is still advancing around v{version}.

CrucibleLifecycleHeader.headline: {status} · v{version}

source.title: Source handoff
source.missingHint: This draft can still move forward, but its original source record is unavailable right now.

workingCopy.title: Working copy

workingCopy.lockedLead: The body is locked, so the working copy remains pinned to v{version}.

editor.bodyHint: Edit the current draft body and resolve accepted issues directly in the text.
editor.discussionHint: Track issues, proposals, and applied resolutions tied to this draft.

permissions.inactiveReason: Only active circle members can perform this action.

reasons.createIssue: This circle requires at least {role} to submit an issue.
reasons.followupIssue: This circle requires at least {role} to add follow-up context to an issue.
reasons.withdrawOwnIssue: This circle does not allow withdrawing your own issue before review starts.
reasons.reviewIssue: This circle requires at least {role} to start or handle issue review.
reasons.retagIssue: This circle requires at least {role} to retag an issue.
reasons.applyAcceptedIssue: This circle requires at least {role} to mark an accepted issue as applied to the draft.
reasons.endDraftingEarly: This circle requires at least {role} to end drafting early and move into review.
reasons.advanceFromReview: This circle requires at least {role} to finish the current review round and move into the next revision.
reasons.enterCrystallization: This circle requires at least {role} to enter crystallization.
reasons.retagIssueDisabled: This circle does not currently allow retagging issues during review.

errors.missingDraftContext: Missing draft context, so the revision suggestion cannot be generated yet.
errors.missingArtifact: AI did not return a readable revision artifact.
errors.missingContent: AI did not return usable revision content.
errors.generateFailed: Failed to generate the revision suggestion. Please try again.
errors.acceptFailed: Failed to accept the revision plan. Please try again.

pending.title: Generating an issue-thread revision
pending.hint: The system is reading {count} pending issue threads and preparing a structured revision.

applied.title: Revision written into the draft
applied.hint: This issue-thread revision has been written into the current body. Related accepted paragraph issues will be preselected during later edits, and you can still deselect them.

accepted.title: Revision plan accepted
accepted.hint: This revision plan was accepted, but the current draft changed before it could be written in. Refresh the draft surface and try again.

candidate.title: Issue-thread revision draft
candidate.emptyDraftHint: The system generated paragraph-level revision suggestions from {count} pending issue threads.
candidate.existingDraftHint: These revision suggestions were generated from {count} pending issue threads. Applying one will immediately update its target paragraph in the current draft.
candidate.carryHint: Applying a plan also records the linked issue threads so later edits can keep their context aligned.

idle.title: Issue-thread revision assist
idle.hint: This appears only during review and turns {count} pending issue threads into paragraph-level revision plans for the next drafting round.

SourceMaterialsPanel.title: Source materials
SourceMaterialsPanel.hint: Upload grounding files the AI can read while drafting and review are in progress.

notices.uploadDisabled: You need edit access before uploading source materials.

errors.walletNotConnected: Connect your wallet before creating a circle.
errors.userRejected: You cancelled the wallet signature, so the circle was not created.
errors.insufficientFunds: Your wallet does not have enough SOL to pay the on-chain fee.
errors.constraintSeeds: The circle program configuration does not match this network (PDA validation failed). Check the RPC and Program ID.
errors.circleManagerMissing: The circle manager has not been initialized yet. Ask an admin to run initialize first.
errors.simulationFailed: Transaction simulation failed. Make sure the wallet network matches the current RPC, and verify that the circle programs were deployed and initialized correctly.
errors.accountNotReady: This wallet account is missing or not funded yet. Send a small amount of SOL and try again.
errors.genericFailure: We couldn't create the circle right now. Please try again.
errors.parentCircleOutOfRange: The parent circle value is outside the on-chain u8 range (0-255).
errors.walletSignerMissing: The wallet is not ready to sign this transaction.
errors.payerAccountMissing: The current wallet account {wallet} does not exist on-chain or is not funded yet.
errors.circleProgramMissing: The circle program is not deployed on the current RPC ({rpc}). Check NEXT_PUBLIC_SOLANA_RPC_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_CIRCLES_PROGRAM_ID.
errors.circleManagerMissingDetailed: The circle manager is not initialized yet ({pda}). Ask an admin to run circles.initialize() first.
errors.eventProgramMissing: The event program is not deployed on the current RPC ({rpc}). Check NEXT_PUBLIC_EVENT_PROGRAM_ID.
errors.eventEmitterMissing: The event emitter is not initialized yet ({pda}). Run initialize_event_emitter first.
errors.circleIdAllocationFailed: Circle creation failed because no available circle_id could be allocated.
errors.circleIdMissing: Circle creation failed because the new circle_id was never resolved.
errors.forkAnchorSyncFailed: The circle was created, but the fork anchor could not be written yet. You can retry later.
errors.indexerLagging: The transaction is on-chain, but indexing is still catching up. Refresh again shortly.
errors.signatureSlotMissing: The transaction was submitted, but we could not determine its confirmation slot yet.
errors.readModelLagging: The circle was created, but it is not visible in the circle list read model yet. Refresh again shortly.
errors.metadataSyncFailed: The circle was created, but the description could not be saved. You can retry from the circle settings page.
errors.ghostSettingsSyncFailed: The circle was created, but the AI settings could not be saved. You can retry from the circle settings page.
errors.genesisModeSyncFailed: The circle was created, but the genesis mode could not be saved. You can retry from the circle settings page.
errors.seededSourcesSyncFailed: The circle was created, but the seeded source files could not be imported yet. You can retry later.
errors.joinPolicySyncFailed: The circle was created, but the access policy could not be saved. You can retry from the circle settings page.
errors.draftLifecycleSyncFailed: The circle was created, but the draft lifecycle settings could not be saved. You can retry from the circle settings page.
errors.workflowPolicySyncFailed: The circle was created, but the workflow permissions could not be saved. You can retry from the circle settings page.
errors.postCreateSyncPending: The circle was created, but the follow-up configuration is still saving. You can retry from the circle settings page later.
errors.postCreateSyncFailed: The circle was created, but the follow-up configuration could not be saved. You can retry from the circle settings page later.
